briefdescription.para: This file contains the constants, type definitions, variables as used in the USB chapter 9 and mass storage demo application.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a hvm 2/22/07 First release 4.00a hvm 12/20/10 Updated with the Audio device definitions. 5.6 pm 07/05/23 Added support for system device-tree flow. 5.8 ka 01/29/26 Fixed codespell errors.
